education_required: Diploma in Mechanical / Plastics / B.Tech/B.E in Mechanical / Plastics
raw_text:
26. Mold Design Engineer

Job Summary  
Designs molds for plastic injection, blow molding, and related processes.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Design mold structures, cavities, and cores  
• Develop cooling and ejection systems  
• Perform mo ld flow analysis (preferred)  
• Prepare detailed manufacturing drawings  
• Coordinate with mold makers and production teams  
• Optimize mold performance and cycle time  
Required Skills  
• Mold design expertise  
• Knowledge of plastics and molding processes  
• CAD softw are (NX, SolidWorks, Creo)  
• Mold flow analysis tools (Moldflow – preferred)  
Qualification  
• Diploma / B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Plastics  
Experience  
• 3–7 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹35,000 – ₹70,000 per month
